// The Person Behind the Work

HI, I'M KAM.

20-year-old web designer. Self-taught, obsessed with quality, and building websites that make businesses look as good as the work they actually do.

Read My Story ↓
Tokyo, Japan · 2025
// My Story

TAUGHT MYSELF.
BUILT THE REST.

I've always been drawn to clean, high-quality design — the kind where everything just feels right. The layout, the speed, the way it all flows together. But for a long time I didn't know how to make it myself. So I did what most people do when they want something bad enough — I figured it out on my own.

I started building websites, showing them to people I knew, and asking for real feedback. Not the polite kind. The honest kind. That's when it clicked. I wasn't just building things for fun — I was actually solving a problem that a lot of businesses have. They do great work, but their website doesn't show it. It looks like it was built in 2012, loads slow, or just doesn't exist at all.

Now I build modern, eye-catching, fully functional websites that aren't just built to look good — they're built to load fast, run smooth, and represent the actual quality of the business behind them. No templates. No shortcuts. No waiting months for an agency to hand you something generic that cost $10,000.

I believe everyone deserves a seat at the table. Whether you're a solo contractor in a small town or a growing brand in a major city — your website should reflect the best version of what you do. That's exactly what I build.

// Common Questions

FAQ.

How long does it take?
+
Most sites are delivered in 7 days or less from the time I have everything I need from you — your content, photos, and any brand preferences. More complex projects may take up to 2 weeks but I'll always give you a clear timeline upfront.
What do I need to provide?
+
Ideally — your logo, photos, and a description of your business and services. If you don't have professional photos, that's okay. I can work with what you have or source high-quality stock images that fit your brand.
How many revisions do I get?
+
Revisions are included in every project. I don't nickel-and-dime you for every change. You'll see a preview before anything goes live and we keep refining until you're genuinely happy with it.
Do you do SEO?
+
Every site I build includes basic on-page SEO — proper page titles, meta descriptions, fast load times, and mobile optimization. For advanced SEO campaigns or paid ads, I'd recommend a dedicated SEO specialist, but your site will be built on a solid foundation from day one.
What if I want changes after launch?
+
If you're on the $250/mo Care Plan, unlimited updates are included — new photos, seasonal promotions, text changes, anything. If you're not on the plan, post-launch changes are billed at a small hourly rate. Either way, you're never stuck with a site that doesn't reflect where your business is at.
How do payments work?
+
Simple and transparent. I work on a 50% upfront, 50% on delivery split. You pay half to get started, and the other half once your site is live and you're happy with it. No surprise fees, no hidden costs — what we agree on upfront is what you pay. I accept payment via Venmo, Zelle, PayPal, or bank transfer.
What if I'm not happy with the result?
+
Then we keep working until you are. Revisions are included and I don't consider a project done until you're genuinely proud of what we built together. I show you a full preview before anything goes live — so there are no surprises. My goal isn't just to deliver a website, it's to deliver something you actually want to show off.

READY TO
BUILD SOMETHING?
